query: SELECT pj.id, pj.platform, pj.publishStatus, pj.variantId, pj.brandId FROM publish_jobs pj ORDER BY pj.id DESC LIMIT 20; SELECT cp.id, cp.status, cp.brandId FROM content_packages cp ORDER BY cp.id DESC LIMIT 20;
